title: Communauté de communes du Petit Caux
summary: The former Communauté de communes du Petit Caux  was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created in January 2002. It was disbanded on 1 January 2016 when its member communes merged into the new commune Petit-Caux.
text:
The former Communauté de communes du Petit Caux  was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created in January 2002. It was disbanded on 1 January 2016 when its member communes merged into the new commune Petit-Caux.
